_note: Illustrative visa guidance for the Atlas capstone demo. NOT legal advice — always verify with the destination's official consulate before travel.

Croatia.details: Schengen-area C visa required; apply at the Croatian embassy before travel.

Turkey.details: Apply online via evisa.gov.tr; approval is usually issued within 24 hours.

United Arab Emirates.details: Sponsored or pre-arranged eVisa required; many airlines can arrange it.

Thailand.details: Visa on arrival available at major airports; carry proof of funds and onward ticket.

Japan.details: Short-stay tourist visa required; apply at the Japanese embassy with itinerary and funds.

Indonesia.details: Visa on arrival (B213) available at Bali and major airports for a fee.

Mexico.details: Tourist visa required unless you hold a valid US/UK/Schengen visa, which grants visa-free entry.

Singapore.details: Pre-arranged entry visa required; apply through an authorised agent.

Switzerland.details: Schengen C visa required; apply at the Swiss embassy before travel.

Croatia.details: Visa-free for tourism within the Schengen area; ETIAS authorisation expected from 2025.

Turkey.details: Visa-free for short tourist stays; passport must be valid 6+ months.

United Arab Emirates.details: Free visa on arrival stamped at the airport for US passport holders.

Thailand.details: Visa exemption on arrival for tourism; onward ticket may be checked.

Indonesia.details: Visa on arrival available at Bali and major airports for a fee.

Mexico.details: Visa-free for tourism; complete the FMM tourist form on arrival.

Switzerland.details: Visa-free within the Schengen area; ETIAS expected from 2025.

Croatia.details: Visa-free for tourism within the Schengen area; ETIAS expected from 2025.

Turkey.details: Visa-free for short tourist stays for UK passport holders.

United Arab Emirates.details: Free visa on arrival stamped at the airport for UK passport holders.

Thailand.details: Visa exemption on arrival for tourism.

Indonesia.details: Visa on arrival available at Bali and major airports for a fee.

Mexico.details: Visa-free for tourism; complete the FMM tourist form on arrival.

Switzerland.details: Visa-free within the Schengen area; ETIAS expected from 2025.

Croatia.details: Schengen C visa required; apply at the Croatian embassy before travel.

Turkey.details: eVisa available online for holders of valid Schengen/US/UK visas; otherwise sticker visa.

United Arab Emirates.details: Pre-arranged eVisa required; commonly arranged via airline or hotel.

Thailand.details: Visa on arrival available at major airports for a fee.

Japan.details: Short-stay tourist visa required; apply at the Japanese embassy.

Indonesia.details: Visa on arrival available at Bali and major airports for a fee.

Mexico.details: Visa-free if you hold a valid US/UK/Schengen/Canada/Japan visa; otherwise visa required.

Singapore.details: Visa-free entry for tourism for Indian passport holders.

Switzerland.details: Schengen C visa required; apply at the Swiss embassy before travel.
